category_sources: source_facts.description says simple REPL and CLI tool for running Wren scripts; official wren.io CLI page describes the Wren command-line interface.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub README and wren.io documentation use Wren CLI; source_facts.name is wren-cli.
docs_sources: Official wren.io CLI pages provide usage and module documentation; official GitHub README links to wren.io/cli for documentation.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has https://github.com/wren-lang/wren-cli, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official wren.io CLI docs identify a REPL/CLI for running Wren scripts.
